Project.title: Project
Project.description: A translation project with video transcription, translation, and custom speech options.

id.description: The unique ID of the project

videoUrl.description: URL or identifier for the source video file

transcript.description: Raw extracted video transcript in SRT format or segment text

userId.description: The Firebase auth user ID owner of this project

/projects/{projectId}.description: Collection of all video translation projects owned by users
